name: Daily IonoSeis Update
on:
  schedule:
    - cron: '0 0 * * *' # Запуск каждый день в полночь по UTC
  workflow_dispatch:      # Позволяет нажать кнопку "Run workflow" в GitHub вручную
jobs:
  update:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v2
      - name: Setup Python
        uses: actions/setup-python@v2
        with: 
          python-version: '3.9'
      - name: Install dependencies
        run: pip install streamlit earthaccess matplotlib numpy
      - name: Run Analysis
        run: python main.py
